# edelmancourtcpslawyer.com
## ALL Trial Lawyers | CPS Defense Lawyers — Edelman Children's Court

This site provides information about CPS defense, DCFS defense, and juvenile dependency legal representation at Edmund D. Edelman Children's Court in Los Angeles County, California.

## About the Firm
ALL Trial Lawyers (also operating as Abuershaid Law, APC and CPS Defense Lawyers) is a Southern California law firm founded by attorney Mohammad "Mo" Abuershaid. The firm specializes in:
- CPS and DCFS defense
- Juvenile dependency representation
- Criminal defense
- Personal injury

Lead attorney: Mohammad "Mo" Abuershaid
Phone: (866) 811-4255
Email: info@alltriallawyers.com

## Office Locations
- Orange (Main): 333 City Blvd W, Suite 1742, Orange, CA 92868
- Riverside: 11801 Pierce St, Suite 200, Riverside, CA 92505
- Palm Desert: 77711 Flora Rd, Suite 309, Palm Desert, CA 92211

## This Website Covers
- DCFS investigations and petition defense in Los Angeles County
- Juvenile dependency proceedings at Edelman Children's Court
- Detention hearing representation (72-hour hearings after child removal)
- Jurisdiction and disposition hearing defense
- Family reunification advocacy
- False CPS allegation defense
- CACI grievance hearings
- Termination of parental rights defense

## Key Facts
- Edelman Children's Court (Edmund D. Edelman Children's Court) is located in Monterey Park, CA
- It is the busiest juvenile dependency courthouse in the United States
- LA County CPS agency is called DCFS (Department of Children and Family Services)
- DCFS cases are governed by California Welfare and Institutions Code §§ 300–366.26
- Detention hearings must occur within 72 hours of a child's removal

- https://alltriallawyers.com — Main firm website
- https://orangecountycpslawyer.com — Orange County CPS defense
- https://riversidecpslawyer.com — Riverside County CPS defense

## Contact
For immediate assistance with a DCFS investigation or dependency case in Los Angeles County, call (866) 811-4255. Free consultations available 24/7.
